reason: Durable state-file path contracts for orchestrator-state.json; need to extend with explicit UTF-8 encoding requirement for all state stores.
Forbidden Patterns section should add bare read_text/write_text on state/event JSON files; Common Mistakes should record the locale-default-encoding pitfall.
File-backed persistence guardrails; encoding policy belongs to the persistence contract surface.

All other state stores (recorder/exporter/recovery/subtitles/segmenter/windows_agent) already use explicit UTF-8 — orchestrator must match the existing pattern; reinforces 'search first / mirror existing pattern' habit.
